name: HeavensSea
short_description: HeavensSea is a turn-based strategy game with a tabletop game style. Players build and strengthen their air fleets to compete for control of various island regions against enemies. Each region has different defense facilities, so players must choose suitable aircraft and firepower to deal with them.
detailed_description:
Combining the strategy of tabletop games with the interactivity of flight games, it brings players a brand-new gaming experience.

Diversified aircraft and firepower: The game offers a wide range of aircraft types and firepower equipment for players to choose from.

Each aircraft and firepower has its unique performance and purpose, requiring players to reasonably match them according to the battlefield situation.

Each island area has its unique terrain and enemy configuration, and players need to analyze the intelligence and formulate the best attack strategy.

Each area has unique occupation benefits.

supported_languages:
English*, German, Russian, Japanese, Simplified Chinese*, Traditional Chinese, Korean
*languages with full audio support
